data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for follow-up reminders for non-signers, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation or functionality of this feature. The absence of any API reads or state checks related to follow-up reminders indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of follow-up reminders for non-signers functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
